name: Enthrall
description: You weave a distracting string of words, causing creatures of your choice that you can see within range to make a Wisdom saving throw. Any creature that can't be Charmed automatically succeeds on this saving throw. A creature that fails its save has the Charmed condition for the duration. While Charmed, the creature has a -10 penalty to Wisdom (Perception) checks made to perceive any creature other than you. The spell ends if you move more than 60 feet from any Charmed creature or if you have the Incapacitated condition.
